argument_chain: The denial cites lack of medical necessity, but CPT 97110 is standard care for tibial fractures
UnitedHealthcare's own clinical guidelines support physical therapy post-fracture
strongest_arguments: Physical therapy is medically necessary following tibial fracture per AAOS 2024 guidelines
Denial contradicts insurer's own coverage policy for post-surgical rehabilitation

denial_linked_to_policy.contradiction: Denial was issued without physician review
